style: whimsical toy theater finale puzzle game, measuring tape, wooden seesaw plank, rolling triangular fulcrum, swinging sandbag, falling ceiling dirt, springy mechanical slapstick
notes: 精简版：只保留支撑机关读法和最终笑点的核心音效。卷尺与跷跷板相关音效要清楚、有弹性，但不要变成动作片。

cues.purpose_cn: 三角形默认左侧锚点：轻微抬起又落回斜面，没有获得翻滚动能。
cues.prompt: A small wooden triangular fulcrum block lifts slightly on a sloped toy stage, then drops back with a soft wooden tap and tiny rattle, failed puzzle action, gentle slapstick, no music

cues.purpose_cn: 三角形右侧锚点正确：沿斜面翻滚，到木板下方支点位停稳，木板轻轻抬起。
cues.prompt: A wooden triangular block tumbles down a small slope, clear rolling wooden clacks, settles under a plank as a fulcrum, then the plank gives a tiny upward creak, satisfying toy theater mechanism

cues.purpose_cn: 卷尺默认尺盒锚点：尺带快速缩回，尺盒原地跳一下/转一圈，仍在地面。
cues.prompt: A metal measuring tape snaps back into its case, fast springy zip, the tape measure case hops and spins once on a wooden floor, comic failed action, clean mechanical toy sound

cues.purpose_cn: 卷尺尺头锚点正确：尺盒被回收力拉出并滑上木板，停在发射位。
cues.prompt: A measuring tape retracts with a springy zip, pulling the metal case forward, it skids up onto a wooden plank and stops in position with a small clack, clever puzzle success

cues.purpose_cn: 沙袋顶部/中间锚点错误：轻晃或嘎吱，掉一点灰，但泥土不够。
cues.prompt: A small sandbag on a ceiling rod swings weakly, rope creak, wooden beam groan, a tiny sprinkle of dust falls, but nothing heavy drops, failed toy theater mechanism

cues.purpose_cn: 沙袋底部锚点正确：大幅摆动，带动天花板一角，泥土落到木板右端。
cues.prompt: A sandbag swings wide from a low pivot, rope strain and wooden ceiling beam creak, loose ceiling dirt breaks free and falls in a soft earthy thud onto one end of a wooden plank, readable toy theater physics

cues.purpose_cn: 泥土压下木板右端，左端翘起，卷尺被弹向高处开关并撞开。
cues.prompt: A wooden seesaw plank snaps upward, springy lever motion launches a metal measuring tape case, quick whoosh, the case hits a high stage switch with a bright mechanical click, satisfying finale puzzle action

cues.purpose_cn: 卷尺回弹砸到小演员，帽子歪掉，同时灯亮/幕布开，形成最终喜剧收尾。
cues.prompt: A metal measuring tape case rebounds with a springy zip and bonks a small puppet on the hat, harmless slapstick pop, tiny cloth rustle, then warm stage lights click on and a curtain swishes open, comic finale
